reason: KFTT Japanese teacher sources produced systematic entity, era-name and term corruption on jpn_Jpan->eng_Latn; successful generation and automatic filtering therefore do not qualify the corpus for TD-05

manual_review.reason_for_incomplete_decisions: The frozen any-block-prevents-TD05 policy requires review to stop at the first systemic blocker; unreviewed rows were not auto-passed.

examples.source: 安永7年（1778年）12月二品に叙せられる。
examples.teacher_target: In December of the 7th year of Eiyo (1778), he was promoted to the second rank.
examples.error: The An'ei era name was changed to the nonexistent Eiyo.

examples.source: 天慶3年（940年）、藤原秀郷と協力して将門を攻め、2月14日「北山の決戦」にてこれを滅ぼす。
examples.teacher_target: In the 3rd year of Tenkei (940), he collaborated with Fujiwara no Hidemoto to attack Toshimoto, and on February 14, he defeated him in the ‘Battle of Kita-yama’.
examples.error: Fujiwara no Hidesato and Masakado were replaced by different names.

examples.source: 三善為長（みよしのためなが、寛弘4年（1007年）-永保元年8月3日(旧暦)（1081年9月8日））は、平安時代中期の貴族。
examples.teacher_target: Miyoši no Tamenaga (宽弘4年 (1007) – August 3, Year 1 of Eiho (old calendar) (September 8, 1081)) was a noble of the mid-Heian period.
examples.error: An English target retained Simplified Chinese era text and corrupted the name romanization.

examples.source: 同年12月8日_(旧暦)の『孝親日記』にその事が記されている。
examples.teacher_target: It is recorded in the ‘Journal of Filial Piety’ on December 8 of the same year_(lunar calendar).
examples.error: A proper-title entity was converted into an unsupported semantic gloss.

examples.source: しかし2度の酒税改正により、チューハイなどに比べ、割安感があまり感じられなくなってきたのが実情となっている。
examples.teacher_target: However, due to two rounds of liquor tax reforms, it has become a reality that, compared to drinks like tuhao, the sense of being cheaper is no longer as noticeable.
examples.error: Chuhai was changed to the nonexistent product term tuhao.

decision.required_remediation: Remove KFTT Japanese from teacher-generated English targets or consume its locked human English parallel side directly under a new data/config/generation identity, then rerun the complete fixed review gate.
